eval-criteria-1.content:
Evaluate `integration.feature.md` for quality and legitimacy:

- **Cross-Capability Focus**: Flag scenarios that test single-capability behavior (these belong in `requirements/`). Integration scenarios MUST involve 2+ capabilities interacting.
- **@capability Tagging**: Flag scenarios missing @capability tags or tagged with only one capability
- **Normative Language**: Flag weak language (should, may, might, can, will) — integration scenarios use SHALL/MUST
- **Atomicity**: Flag scenarios collapsing multiple distinct commands into one When-Then pair — each command gets its own scenario for failure localization
eval-criteria-1.justification: Testability (function names in Then clauses) consolidated into Requirements critic to eliminate duplication — both critics independently flagged the same pattern class
eval-criteria-1.evidence: Team guidance critic_coordination-00006: Requirements TESTABILITY-1 flags cmd_build(); Integration TESTABILITY-1 flags load_config(), image_exists() — same finding class, two critics

severity-cal-1.content:
- **HIGH**: Blocks implementation or causes incorrect behavior
- **MEDIUM**: Degrades functionality or creates ambiguity that will require rework
- **LOW**: Minor issue, style, or nitpick that won't block progress

critic-output-quality-00003.content: Classify critic findings as useful when they quote violating text, cite a named criterion, and suggest a fix
critic-output-quality-00003.justification: Reusable heuristic for triaging critic output — three-part test observed at 100% hit rate across 3 findings
critic-output-quality-00003.evidence: All 3 integration critic findings met quote+criterion+fix pattern and were correctly classified as useful

critic-design-00004.content: Constrain critics to 3-4 evaluation dimensions for higher signal-to-noise
critic-design-00004.justification: Meta-pattern for critic architecture — narrow rubrics produced 3/3 useful findings vs broader reviewers
critic-design-00004.evidence: Integration critic with testability, atomicity, cross-capability dimensions achieved 100% useful finding rate
